# CANDIDATE: BULLISH_RECLAIM_RIDE_THE_RIBBON_WITH_VOLUME_SURGE_CONFIRMATION

## Hypothesis

The BULLISH_RECLAIM_RIDE_THE_RIBBON setup can be improved by incorporating a volume surge confirmation, which would increase the confidence in the trade and potentially lead to better performance.

## Mechanism

The mechanism involves adding a volume surge confirmation to the existing BULLISH_RECLAIM_RIDE_THE_RIBBON setup. The confirmation would require a significant increase in volume on the reclaim bar, indicating a strong buying interest and increasing the likelihood of a successful trade.
